title: xyris retusa
intro: Xyris retusa, also known as the yellow-eyed grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Xyris retusa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infection. Xyris retusa is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used topically as a salve or poultice to harness its medicinal properties.
